basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Rourkela. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation: relaxed up to 5 years in the case of candidates belonging to Schedule Castes / Schedule Tribes / PWD and Female applicants whereas 3 years in the case of OBCs (Non-creamy layer candidates).

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Biotechnology/Biomedical Engineering/Biochemical Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/ equivalent branches with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with GATE/NET qualification, M.E./M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Biomedical Engineering/Biochemical Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/ equivalent specializations with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with GATE/NET qualification, M.Sc. in Chemistry/Physics/Materials Sciences/Life sciences/ equivalent specializations with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with GATE/ NET (including lectureship)/ other national level fellowship tests
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. in Biotechnology/Biomedical Engineering/Biochemical Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/ equivalent branches with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with GATE/NET qualification (including lectureship)/other national level fellowship tests. M.E./M.Tech. in Biotechnology/Biomedical Engineering/Biochemical Engineering/Chemical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/ equivalent specializations with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with GATE/NET qualification (including lectureship)/other national level fellowship tests. M.Sc. in Chemistry/Physics/Materials Sciences/Life sciences/ equivalent specializations with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with GATE/ NET (including lectureship)/ other national level fellowship tests.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Rourkela is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E., M.E./M.Tech., or M.Sc. degree in relevant fields with a minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60%, along with GATE/NET qualification or equivalent national fellowship tests.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 28 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Rourkela JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
